author: Oleg B.
pros: Our project uses residential proxies from BrightData. I can say that it's the biggest residential network in the industry and pretty fast compared with other solutions for the same price. Thanks to [SENSITIVE CONTENT] for the great customer support
cons: a bit pricey, but not so critical for our product
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Very competitive, powerful and flexible proxy tool
description: You need to pass throw several layers of security to verify your identity and how do you intent to use the service, which is of the benefit of all, for the common good, in order to avoid your service interrupted by the fraudulent usage of other clients, but once your account is good to go, and your account manager (super reliable) helps you to find the correct tools for your needs, it is really straight forward, and super efficient.
author: Gonzalo M.
pros: - The simplicity, but at the same time how flexible and powerful is. - The collection of products that adjusts very well to any need and budget. - How you can, with the proper tool, configuration and extra costs, use private connections or reserve the traffic to some specific domains, so that you don't get banned by rate limits, as you generally if/when you share IPs. - The latency is not bad, and the proxies barely fails. - Even when you setup the dynamic ips option, you can still open a session to re-use the same IPs. - The support is awesome: personalised, fast and efficient.
cons: - There are proxy errors time to time (at least in the residential), which does not make it pixel perfect, but I have also to say that this error rate is pretty low, in comparison with other proxies provider.

review_title: Extremely Disappointed – Unprofessional and Poor Communication
description: This level of mismanagement and lack of communication is completely unacceptable. If this is how they handle basic coordination, I can’t imagine how they deal with more important matters. I would not recommend relying on them if you expect professionalism and accountability. Avoid if you value your time.
author: Kaufast S.
pros: Nothing yet. Totally disappointed on the customer service.
cons: had an incredibly frustrating experience with Bright Data. I was flagged for no reason whatsoever, despite not even having used the service a single time. To make matters worse, a scheduled Google Meet was canceled without any prior notice or explanation.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: We are sending HTTP requests to certain endpoints of different online platforms to get user registration info and assign a fraud score based on that. Brightdata is one of our main providers to run our social checks upon.
author: Balint T.
pros: Speed, reliability, performance, support
cons: Pricing, certain domains (Microsoft) and SMTP are blocked, no SOAX5 mobile proxy

review_title: Good proxies most of the time
description: We only use proxies (Residential and Static ones). The rest of the work is in our side.
author: Juan Pablo B.
pros: The product is easy to use and very configurable. There is a good support which is very important for us. We had a good help on our last issue from [SENSITIVE CONTENT]. And also when we had others in the past.
cons: Sometimes proxies are not working as expected, specially Residential ones. There are days where they are anyway blocked for some companies like Incapsula, Cloudflare, PerimeterX and others. After raising a ticket or receiving an email from you guys that there will be some maintenance, the problem is fixed.

review_title: Best Web data platform with best proessional Team
description: My overall experince with them is 10/10. I just faced a little problem while accessing some things in software and from my account manager [SENSITIVE CONTENT] to support team person [SENSITIVE CONTENT] they professionally handled my problem and solved it in less then my expecting time. [SENSITIVE CONTENT] guided me and solved my technical problem like a teacher and mentor. Totally impressed by there professional attitude and hardwork they are putting in to it.
author: Shajjan M.
pros: You can get best technology and updates in the whole bright data software. Everything inside the data plat form is full of technolgy and you can learn alot from it.
cons: I can say they can make it more user friendly so a normal person can use it easily like API stuffs etc.

author: Yogesh S.
pros: Dashboard, Functionality, Robustness, Uptime
cons: can be more proactive towards ticket resolution

review_title: Great service for building a wonderful business on!
author: Leigh M.
pros: For us at changedetection.io , we found the customer support to be EXCELLENT, their services are solid, but when you're building a business you really need a good relationship with your provider, because there's always questions and things to resolve, ways to work better together etc.
cons: I wish residential proxy prices was lower, but they're on average similar to other providers, so it's no big problem

author: Verified Reviewer

cons: Sometimes datacenter goes down. People from support take a little bit too much time to respond.

description: Excelente tanto en calidad de plataforma y servicio.

cons: Mejoraria la opción de manejar multiples cuentas en un solo usuario master y quizas el tema de billing.

review_title: Poor Reliability and High Error Rates. DO NOT USE.
description: Bright data's web unlocker and proxy products claimed to unlock hard to scrape websites... in reality this was not the case as it had a very high failure rate and I was charged for unsuccessful queries.
author: Emiliano G.
pros: Nothing. Initially their web unlocker and proxy products worked great for our use case.... But over the course of a year their products have degraded rapidly, and now face high data fetching failure rates.
cons: I found the documentation lacking in clear example use cases, which made setting up difficult. Despite using Bright Data to collect e-commerce data, I feel it fails in making the process easier. The scraping browser API, while promising in theory, does not perform well in practice. Over time, the product's performance has degraded significantly, leading to a high error rate. I am also frustrated by being charged for results that I did not receive back.

review_title: Effortless Web Scraping with Unmatched Accuracy
description: I use Bright Data for complex web scraping, which helps us prepare for conferences by tracking and comparing competitor data. It enables effective automation, accessing data on a large scale, and supports different geographical data needs, enhancing growth strategy and saving time. I appreciate its low error rate, trend awareness, and its ease of use for non-technical users. The pricing, functionality, and error management are satisfactory, and I’m pleased compared to other solutions. I rate it a 10 out of 10 for recommendation.
author: Pasha K.
pros: I really like that Bright Data has a much lower error rate compared to other solutions available. They keep up with trends well by developing new features like MCP, which seems promising. Their AI functionality is really helpful for building automations and they make it easy for non-techy people like me to get into web scraping easier. It’s great that they've lowered the barrier for using their service. The price is also at a good level, which I appreciate.
cons: As long as the scraping error volumes are low and the price is affordable, it's totally fine to live with.
